lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: Greetings adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's with all the shields?

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: Although archers like myself like to keep distance from our enemies, it's always good to have a bit of protection.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Very sensible! Did you make these yourself?

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: I am a bit of a craftsman, I indeed made all these shields.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you make them?

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: It's very simple! First you'll need to be skilled in crafting and fletching, the exact details you can find in your skill guide.

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: For every shield, you'll require some tools! A knife for fletching the wood and a hammer for crafting the shield.

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: As for resources, you'll need 2 logs, 2 pieces of tanned leather and 15 nails.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I find out more information about the resources needed?

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: I have a flyer! It details all the shields and the resources needed for them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have a resource flyer?

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: Of course! The more you know, the better!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: You already have a flyer, I've only so many left.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: My name is William! And I'll tell you this, I'm the best crossbowman this side of White Wolf Mountain.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's better than you on the other side of the mountain?

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: Couldn't tell you that myself, never been there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... How did you come across that crossbow then?

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: Oh this? Some wandering merchant came by recently, told me it was the stealthiest crossbow there was.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is it?

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: Well, he told me it was his last one too, so I figured I'd give it a try.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was nice meeting you William.

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: I bet!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have a resource flyer?

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: Of course! The more you know, the better!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: You already have a flyer, I've only so many left.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Shield master
lines.text: Stay protected adventurer, for it's dangerous out there.
